value: We have adopted the Macy’s, Inc. Insider Trading Policy and procedures

The CMD Committee typically approves annual equity-based awards at its annual March meeting. The March meeting occurs after annual financial results are available — at least three weeks after we release our fiscal year-end earnings. The CMD Committee may approve equity-based grants on other dates for purposes such as newly hired executives, executives promoted into positions eligible for such grants, or to retain executives important to the Company.
